title: Create a customer rollout packet from a template tenant
persona: Implementation lead with settings edit access
steps: Review template assets, role grants, module flags, seed packs, connector metadata, and readiness checks.
expected: A persisted AssistantRolloutFactoryPacket is created with templateInventoryJson, roleGrantPlanJson, moduleFlagPlanJson, demoDataPlanJson, readinessCheckJson, rollbackPlanJson, onboardingPacketJson, and leadershipSummary.
Connector credentials appear as metadata-only when auth requires secrets.
No tenant, template, role grant, module flag, seed command, automation policy, connector, or secret is created or changed automatically.

title: Queue rollout launch review
persona: Customer success owner with settings edit access
steps: Create or select a DRAFT rollout packet.
Add a launch approval note describing customer pilot scope.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_rollout_factory_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent states tenants, templates, seeds, grants, module flags, automations, connectors, and secrets were not changed automatically.

title: Readiness gaps block launch until reviewed
steps: Use a template tenant with at least one missing required role grant or module view grant.
Review the readiness and rollback sections.
expected: Role grant or module gaps appear in roleGrantPlanJson/moduleFlagPlanJson and readinessCheckJson status is BLOCKED.
The rollback plan includes pilot-mode, module disable, draft archive, automation shadow pause, and grant revocation steps.
The UI keeps launch actions review-gated and does not execute copy, seed, grant, or enablement work.
